mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username, u.display_name AS displayName FROM kb_kb_member m LEFT JOIN kb_user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.kb_id = #{kbId} ORDER BY m.id
SELECT * FROM kb_kb_member WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_kb_member (kb_id, user_id, permission) VALUES (#{kbId}, #{userId}, #{permission})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_kb_member SET permission = #{permission} WHERE id = #{id}
